---
title: "Math 3190 Assignments"
---

This website contains all homework assignments for Math 3190

```{r, echo=FALSE}
library(ggplot2)

# Face outline
t <- seq(0, 2*pi, length.out = 500)
face <- data.frame(
  x = cos(t),
  y = sin(t)
)

# Left eye
t_eye <- seq(0, 2*pi, length.out = 200)
left_eye <- data.frame(
  x = -0.35 + 0.1*cos(t_eye),
  y =  0.35 + 0.1*sin(t_eye)
)

# Right eye
right_eye <- data.frame(
  x = 0.35 + 0.1*cos(t_eye),
  y = 0.35 + 0.1*sin(t_eye)
)

# Smile
t_mouth <- seq(pi/10, 9*pi/10, length.out = 200)
mouth <- data.frame(
  x = 0.45*cos(t_mouth),
  y = -0.15 - 0.35*sin(t_mouth)
)

ggplot() +
  geom_polygon(data = face, aes(x, y), fill="pink", color="black", linewidth = 1) +
  geom_polygon(data = left_eye, aes(x, y), fill="black", linewidth = 1) +
  geom_polygon(data = right_eye, aes(x, y), fill="black", linewidth = 1) +
  geom_path(data = mouth, aes(x, y), linewidth = 2) +
  coord_fixed() +
  theme_void()
```
